name: get_artifact
description: PREFER THIS over multiple get_file calls. Bundles the entry file plus every sibling it references (HTML

project.description: Project id (UUID) or name substring. Optional; defaults to the active project (expires after ~5 minutes of no Open Design activity).

entry.description: Entry file path relative to project root. Defaults to the active file or project's metadata.entryFile. Active-file fallback expires after ~5 minutes of no Open Design activity.

maxBytes.description: Soft cap on total text bytes (default 1_500_000). Also capped at 200 files. Excess files are dropped and truncated:true is set.
